commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=130b0f653bd1aeb357dba8a7f8980fb1981e091a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a package changelog helper, wires it into npm prepack/postpack, and adds focused tests so npm packaging can temporarily include only the current release section of `CHANGELOG.md`.

PR surface: Tests +166, Config +1, Other +142. Total +309 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a release-packaging feature PR rather than a bug report. The changed helper behavior is demonstrated by the PR body's package proof, and the remaining concern is source-visible package-builder coverage.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers should decide whether the shared release/package-acceptance tarball builder must receive the same changelog trimming before this protected release-packaging PR lands.

target.title: feat: only include the current changelog section in tarball
target.body:
## Summary

- Keep the repository `CHANGELOG.md` cumulative, including `Unreleased`, and package only the relevant release section during npm prepack.
- Add a `scripts/package-changelog.mjs` helper that backs up the source changelog, selects the package version's exact stable/correction/prerelease section, falls back from prerelease to stable and then `Unreleased`, and restores the source changelog on `postpack` or the next prepack.
- Cover stable, correction, alpha/beta, fallback, missing-section, and prepare/restore behavior in focused tests.

## Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 scripts/package-changelog.mjs scripts/openclaw-prepack.ts test/scripts/package-changelog.test.ts package.json && node --check scripts/package-changelog.mjs && node --check scripts/openclaw-prepack.ts && git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/package-changelog.test.ts` (`1 passed`, `7 passed`)
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --prompt <packaging lifecycle review prompt>` (`autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported`)

## Package Proof

Generated real npm tarballs from the same checkout with `--ignore-scripts`; the only input difference was whether `CHANGELOG.md` had been prepared by `scripts/package-changelog.mjs` before packing.

Commands:

```sh
npm pack --ignore-scripts --json --pack-destination "$full_dir"
node scripts/package-changelog.mjs prepare
npm pack --ignore-scripts --json --pack-destination "$trim_dir"
node scripts/package-changelog.mjs restore
```

Results:

| Pack input | Tarball size | Unpacked size | `CHANGELOG.md` size | Entry count |
| --- | ---: | ---: | ---: | ---: |
| Full source changelog | 3,022,740 bytes | 9,927,030 bytes | 2,399,938 bytes | 798 |
| Packaged current-section changelog | 2,198,753 bytes | 7,533,506 bytes | 6,414 bytes | 798 |

- `CHANGELOG.md` reduction: **2,393,524 bytes** (**99.73% smaller**)
- Whole `.tgz` reduction: **823,987 bytes** (**27.26% smaller**)
- Whole unpacked package reduction: **2,393,524 bytes** (**24.11% smaller**)
- Restore proof: after `node scripts/package-changelog.mjs restore`, source `CHANGELOG.md` returned to `sha256=7abb77d14941d7c1b542d1a04f2010dbd91eeb2826849585c6afbb05e9c96c62`
target.author: romneyda
